note: Registry of EXTERNAL inputs used only by Tier-2 scenario analysis (derived.scenarios). Never used by Tier-1 market metrics. SpaceX is private and does not disclose these figures; values below are dated, attributed press estimates with low confidence and wide ranges. Bump version on any change.

shares_outstanding.name: SpaceX shares outstanding (implied, ~fully diluted)
shares_outstanding.source: Reuters, 'SpaceX insider share sale sets $800 billion valuation' (Dec 13, 2025): implied from a reported ~$800B valuation at $421/share (800e9 / 421 ≈ 1.90B).
shares_outstanding.note: Private company — share count not officially disclosed. Implied from a reported insider tender, not a filing. Basic vs fully-diluted differ materially; treat as a rough public anchor, not precision. A tender is secondary liquidity, included here only as a press-reported estimate.

last_round_valuation.name: SpaceX last reported valuation (Dec 2025 insider tender)
last_round_valuation.source: Reuters, 'SpaceX insider share sale sets $800 billion valuation' (Dec 13, 2025).
last_round_valuation.note: Reported insider/secondary tender valuation, not a primary raise. A rough public anchor for round-over-round context only.
